svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="xxawrpiOxdxbBkIWxacd"> <mxGraphModel dx="2657" dy="1318" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "sequenceDiagram
 autonumber
 participant DB as SQL Server
 participant AG as Sync Agent
 participant IN as ALB + Ingestion
 participant S3 as S3 Landing
 participant WK as SQS + Worker
 participant KMS as KMS
 participant RA as RDS + Audit

 AG->>DB: read-only SELECT (changed rows)
 DB-->>AG: rows
 Note over AG: build batch, encrypt locally, write to spool

 AG->>IN: upload encrypted batch (HTTPS / mTLS)
 IN->>S3: conditional put (idempotent)
 IN-->>RA: record receipt (audit)
 IN-->>AG: durable-receipt ACK
 Note over AG: prune spooled batch (only after ACK)

 Note over AG,RA: asynchronous boundary. agent is free, processing continues independently

 S3->>WK: object-created event (via SQS FIFO)
 WK->>KMS: unwrap data key
 KMS-->>WK: data key
 Note over WK: validate order + mapping, decrypt
 WK->>RA: idempotent upsert / guarded delete
 WK-->>RA: record processing (audit)
 Note over WK,RA: on bad sequence or mapping, pause stream and alert Concourse

",
 "config": null
}" id="SJLouzh7B9YWZXdKnn5F-2"> <mxCell connectable="0" parent="1" style="group;transparentBounds=1;editIcon=1;lockedGroup=0;groupPadding=20;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry as="geometry" /> </mxCell> rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 245, 173), rgb(42, 42, 42)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(170, 170, 51), rgb(204, 204, 204));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 203px; margin-left: 384px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Verdana, Arial, sans-serif; color: light-dark(#333333, #cccccc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
